case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A VS. MOHAMMED SALIMI

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALIMI, MOHAMMED $14,796.60 PRINCIPAL, $439.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,236.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100031955)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $439.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $425.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100031955) AS TO DEFENDANT SALIMI, MOHAMMED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-27-2018 CONTINUED TO JUL-03-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-27-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
